message:
fix: emit plan_end on abort/error + add streaming error/abort test coverage

When the LLM call was aborted or threw an error, plan_start was emitted
but plan_end was never emitted, leaving an orphaned open plan event. Now
plan_end is emitted with finish_reason "interrupted" or "error" in both
catch paths before the break/throw.

Added 4 new tests:
- Streaming error (stream emits error event) -> llm_end + plan_end
- Streaming abort (AbortSignal mid-stream) -> llm_end + plan_end
- Non-streaming error -> plan_end with "error"
- Non-streaming abort -> plan_end with "interrupted"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
